# DMX Digital

> Websites with less noise and more signal.

DMX Digital builds content-first websites that are simple, fast, durable, and clear.

## Canonical URLs

- Home: https://dmxdigital.site/
- Plain text: https://dmxdigital.site/plain.txt
- AI guidance: https://dmxdigital.site/ai.txt
- LLM guidance: https://dmxdigital.site/llms.txt

## Summary

DMX Digital is a small web studio focused on building websites that respect the content. The studio favors clear words, simple pages, static site architecture, fast loading, and minimal unnecessary machinery.

The guiding principle is:

Complexity must earn its place.

## Philosophy

A website should not fight the thing it was built to carry. If the words matter, the design should make them easier to find, easier to read, and easier to trust.

DMX Digital starts with the content, then asks what the page actually needs. Sometimes a site needs beauty. Sometimes it needs structure. Sometimes it needs a publishing system. But it does not need complexity simply because complexity is fashionable.

## Principles

### Content before decoration

The page should serve the message, not bury it under motion, widgets, and visual noise.

### Static before dynamic

If the site does not need a database, login system, or heavy backend, DMX Digital does not add one.

### Clarity before cleverness

The best design is often the one that disappears and lets the reader understand what matters.

## Services

DMX Digital builds plain, durable sites for people with something to say, including:

- Personal and professional websites
- Static Hugo sites
- Decap-backed publishing workflows
- Article, archive, and resource sites
- Plain-text friendly content
- Website refreshes and rebuilds

## Audience

DMX Digital is suited for:

- Writers
- Ministries
- Local businesses
- Campaigns
- Independent publishers
- People and organizations that need a clear home on the web

## Contact

Email: norm@dmxdigital.site
